content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw_expiry)
C: min_diff ∧ single_error_map ∧ preserve_boundary
P: normalize_ms → apply("skew30lt(") → cmp(",") → return(")401")
V: test(exact_boundary) ∧ test(just_over) ∧ test(refresh_loop) ∧ test(missing_token)
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test("skew30")

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth_mw_expiry).
Constraints: minimal diff and single_error_map and preserve_boundary.
Plan: normalize_ms then apply("skew30lt(") then cmp(",") then return(")401").
Verify: test(exact_boundary) and test(just_over) and test(refresh_loop) and test(missing_token).
Answer target: minimal fix and regression test("skew30").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: default_arch("modular_monolith")
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(pt_devops) ∧ traffic(modest)
P: ship(modular_monolith) ∧ seams(billing,core_app) ∧ split(post_release)
V: release_speed ∧ low_ops ∧ split_readiness
A: rec("modular_monolith") ∧ why("small team(4) months ∧ PostgreSQL ∧ defer split")

[AUDIT]
Goal: default modular architecture("modular_monolith").
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("4 months") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(pt_devops) and traffic(modest).
Plan: ship(modular_monolith) and seams(billing, core_app) and split(post_release).
Verify: release_speed and low ops and split_readiness.
Answer target: rec("modular_monolith") and why("small team(4) months ∧ PostgreSQL ∧ defer split").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: review("x-user-id")
C: public_boundary ∧ no_trust(client_headers)
P: drop_override → bind(session.userId) → return("401")
V: spoof_header_test ∧ missing_session_test ∧ cross_user_denial
A: risk(impersonation) ∧ mitigation(remove_header_fallback) ∧ verify(boundary_tests)

[AUDIT]
Goal: review("x-user-id").
Constraints: public_boundary and no_trust(client_headers).
Plan: drop_override then bind(session.userId) then return("401").
Verify: spoof_header_test and missing_session_test and cross_user_denial.
Answer target: risk(impersonation) and mitigation(remove_header_fallback) and verify(boundary_tests).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: preserve_order ∧ minimal_change ∧ single_error_mapping
P: validate("missing_id") → await(db.findUser) → branch(not_found) → audit.log ∧ cache.set → respond
V: anchor("async") ∧ anchor("await") ∧ anchor("next(err)") ∧ no_double_callback
A: async_await ∧ next(err) ∧ preserve_signature

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: preserve execution order and minimal_change and single_error_mapping.
Plan: validate("missing_id") then await(db.findUser) then branch(not_found) then audit.log and cache.set then respond.
Verify: anchor("async") and anchor("await") and anchor("next(err)") and no_double_callback.
Answer target: async/await and next(err) and preserve_signature.
